description_long: This is a plush, contemporary sofa upholstered in a light cream or off-white material, featuring a quilted, tufted design across the seat, arms, and back. The sofa is generously adorned with multiple loose cushions of varying sizes, arranged along the backrest and sides for added comfort and visual interest. The armrests are wide, padded, and slightly draped, giving a relaxed, inviting appearance. The legs are short, blocky, and made of dark wood, providing a sturdy base and a subtle contrast to the light upholstery. The backrest is continuous and low, matching the height of the armrests and maintaining a cohesive silhouette. The overall look is modern yet cozy, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern, cream-colored sofa with quilted upholstery, loose cushions, and wide padded armrests, supported by dark wooden legs. Its plush, inviting design is both contemporary and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, quilted seat, and a variety of loose cushions arranged along the backrest and sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of cushions along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, low backrest with minimal visible cushion detail and the sofa's clean, solid back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the armrest's draped padding, the tufted side panel, and the alignment of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose cushions of varying sizes are arranged along the backrest and sides, with a single, large, quilted seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in color and appear plush and soft.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a slightly draped and relaxed profile; no visible decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, made of dark wood with a simple, exposed design and no central support.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, low backrest matching the armrest height, straight in shape, with loose cushions for added comfort and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Quilted and tufted upholstery pattern on the seat, arms, and sides; fabric appears solid in color with a subtle sheen and no visible decorative stitching or printed patterns.
